_comment: Fabric IQ semantic layer (synthetic). Ontology connecting people, roles, certifications, skills, scope rules and decisions into unified business entities. All data is fabricated for demonstration.

certifications.name: KISS Practitioner: Scope Discipline & Token ROI

scope_tiers.meaning: Current sprint / v1 launch scope. Build it.

rules.rule: A learner is exam-ready when practice_score_avg >= pass_threshold AND hours_studied >= 0.75 * recommended_hours.
A learner is at-risk when meeting_hours_per_week > 20 (low study completion correlation).
Prerequisite certifications must be passed before scheduling the next certification.
Any feature request classified Tier 2 or 3 must be parked in DECISIONS.md with a revisit trigger, never built during the active sprint.
Study blocks must be scheduled inside focus hours, never over meeting-heavy periods.
